misc.title: [#ONEPIECE] [#ONEPIECE1182] BIG DISCOVERY!!! Theory 🧵 It’s pertaining to Omen & Imu being Earth God. I went & did research & came across something I never thought I would find. Manuscripts of the Qur
misc.text: [#ONEPIECE] [#ONEPIECE1182] BIG DISCOVERY!!! Theory 🧵 It’s pertaining to Omen & Imu being Earth God. I went & did research & came across something I never thought I would find. Manuscripts of the Quran from the 16th-17th century illustrations & it be called Falname: Book Of Omens! This what I believe inspired Oda & also mention of Earth Beast that similar to IMU!! With spots all over him,horns & wings. Cont on.

misc.text: #JOYCONBOYZFOREVER Etika Memories (@EtikaMemories) Happy 36th birthday Etika! Today you would have been turning 36. And we the Joycon Boyz will always be here to wish you a damn good one. It has been almost 7 years since you've been gone and everyday we all still cherish you so much. We hope you have been resting well. 🖤🦋 — https://nitter.net/EtikaMemories/status/2054184827088232668#m

misc.title: I think we don’t Credit Ikemoto🐐enough for his designs. I don’t think there are Mangaka who put such thoughts into their designs like Ikemoto🐐 does. Designing fused Momoshiki black and white as a br
misc.text: I think we don’t Credit Ikemoto🐐enough for his designs. I don’t think there are Mangaka who put such thoughts into their designs like Ikemoto🐐 does. Designing fused Momoshiki black and white as a bridge between white and black people is a huge symbol against racism!❤️ #BORUTO

misc.text: It’s not looking good for BoruSara shippers. If you look at both Sarada’s and Kawaki’s eye you can see that if you overlap those eyes they fill their empty space completely. And we know Ikemoto loves symbolism. KawaSara is possible to become the canon ship… #BORUTO

items.text: [#ONEPIECE] [#ONEPIECE1182] BIG DISCOVERY!!! Theory 🧵 It’s pertaining to Omen & Imu being Earth God. I went & did research & came across something I never thought I would find. Manuscripts of the Quran from the 16th-17th century illustrations & it be called Falname: Book Of Omens! This what I believe inspired Oda & also mention of Earth Beast that similar to IMU!! With spots all over him,horns & wings. Cont on.
